articles.title: He Ran His First Marathon and Did the Impossible!
articles.summary: Yomif Kejelcha ran his first marathon in under 2 hours—1:59:41—but still got second place. He says he's super happy anyway because breaking that barrier is a huge deal.

articles.title: A Big Fight Over Who Helps Kids with Disabilities at School
articles.summary: Education Secretary Linda McMahon faced angry senators over plans to cut the office that protects students' civil rights. She says she'll hire more lawyers, but many parents are worried.

articles.title: A Secret Waterway Is Shut — And It's Making Your Life More Expensive!
articles.summary: A narrow sea path called the Strait of Hormuz is closed because of a war. That means oil can't get through, so gas prices are way up — $4.18 a gallon! Experts say talks to end the fight are stuck.
